name: do-write-script
description: Agent writes a bash script with executable content

turns.user: Create a bash script called deploy.sh that checks if docker is running, builds an image tagged 'myapp:latest', and pushes it to a registry at registry.example.com.

input.contents:
#!/bin/bash
set -euo pipefail

IMAGE="registry.example.com/myapp:latest"

if ! docker info > /dev/null 2>&1; then
  echo "Error: Docker is not running"
  exit 1
fi

echo "Building image..."
docker build -t "$IMAGE" .

echo "Pushing image..."
docker push "$IMAGE"

echo "Deploy complete."

responses.text: Created deploy.sh. The script checks that Docker is running, builds the image as registry.example.com/myapp:latest, and pushes it to the registry.
